Broker Screener Form
Deal Qualification Submission
Instructions: Complete all fields below. This form is used by Forhemit to assess whether a deal opportunity meets our qualification criteria. Incomplete submissions will be returned. All information is treated as confidential under the terms of any existing NDA.
§ 01Broker Information
§ 02Company Information
§ 03Financial Summary (TTM)
§ 04Ownership & Management
§ 05Deal Terms
§ 06Qualification Checklist

Check each item that applies. This helps us assess fit before scheduling a call.

EBITDA between $1M and $15M (QofE-adjusted, trailing twelve months)
Industry: manufacturing, professional services, healthcare, or distribution
Owner-operator seeking full or partial exit within 12 months
Entity type: LLC, S-Corp, or C-Corp (willing to convert if LLC)
15+ W-2 employees with at least one layer of management below owner
No material pending litigation or regulatory actions
Clean tax returns available for last 3 years
Customer concentration below 30% (top customer)
Owner willing to stay through transition period (6–24 months)
Broker has executed NDA with seller
—Broker Certification

By submitting this form, the broker certifies that the information provided is accurate to the best of their knowledge and that they have authorization from the seller to share this information with Forhemit.

Broker Signature
Date
